scripts.deploy-testnet:compliant: AZTEC_ENV=testnet DEPLOY_ONLY=true LOG_LEVEL='silent;info:bridge' node --import tsx index-testnet-compliant.ts
scripts.deploy-testnet:compliant:token: AZTEC_ENV=testnet DEPLOY_ONLY=true DEPLOY_TOKEN=${TOKEN} LOG_LEVEL='silent;info:bridge' node --import tsx index-testnet-compliant.ts
scripts.test-testnet:compliant: AZTEC_ENV=testnet RUN_TESTS_ONLY=true LOG_LEVEL='silent;info:bridge' node --import tsx index-testnet-compliant.ts
scripts.test-testnet:compliant:fuel-only: AZTEC_ENV=testnet RUN_TESTS_ONLY=true SKIP_TO_FUEL_TESTS=true LOG_LEVEL='silent;info:bridge' node --import tsx index-testnet-compliant.ts
scripts.profile-testnet:compliant: AZTEC_ENV=testnet PROFILE=true RUN_TESTS_ONLY=true LOG_LEVEL='silent;info:bridge' node --import tsx index-testnet-compliant.ts
scripts.e2e-testnet:compliant: AZTEC_ENV=testnet FORCE_REDEPLOY_ALL=true LOG_LEVEL='silent;info:bridge' node --import tsx index-testnet-compliant.ts
scripts.redeploy-testnet:compliant:swaps: AZTEC_ENV=testnet FORCE_REDEPLOY_SWAPS=true DEPLOY_ONLY=true LOG_LEVEL='silent;info:bridge' node --import tsx index-testnet-compliant.ts
scripts.reseed-testnet:compliant:pools: AZTEC_ENV=testnet FORCE_SEED=true DEPLOY_ONLY=true LOG_LEVEL='silent;info:bridge' node --import tsx index-testnet-compliant.ts
scripts.codegen: aztec codegen ../aztec-contracts/token_bridge/target --outdir artifacts && aztec codegen ../aztec-contracts/token_minter_proxy/target --outdir artifacts
scripts.compile: cd ../aztec-contracts/token_bridge && aztec compile && cd ../token_minter_proxy && aztec compile
scripts.build: pnpm run compile && pnpm run compile:l1 && pnpm run codegen
